description_long: This is a weathered circular speed limit sign displaying the number 40 in bold black numerals on a white background. The sign face is bordered by a faded red ring, with significant signs of rust, dirt, and surface corrosion, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure. The sign is mounted on a single, slender, cylindrical metal post that also shows signs of rust and wear. The back of the sign is plain and heavily mottled with corrosion, lacking any additional markings or reflectors. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with no decorative elements, and the sign is designed to be highly visible to drivers in urban or suburban environments. The materials and construction indicate durability and resistance to weather, typical for roadside signage.
description: A weathered circular speed limit sign with a red border and the number 40, mounted on a rusted metal pole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faded red-bordered white sign face with the black numeral 40 clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the sign and post, with visible rust and no additional features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, corroded back of the sign and the attachment point to the post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and weathered surface of the post and sign.
